findings.quote: Either party may terminate this agreement by providing Ninety days Written Notice.
findings.why: Either party may terminate without cause on 90 days' written notice — bilateral termination for convenience.

findings.quote: In addition, Lucid may terminate this agreement by giving the Distributor Written Notice if there is any change of control, ownership or  management of the Distributor.
findings.why: Gives Lucid a unilateral right to terminate upon any change of control, ownership or management of the Distributor.

findings.quote: In no event will the aggregate liability incurred by Lucid in any action or  proceeding exceed the total amount actually paid to Lucid by Distributor for the purchase of the products that actually caused the damage or loss.
findings.why: Caps Lucid's aggregate liability at the total purchase price of the specific products that caused the damage.

findings.quote: Lucid will not have any liability or responsibility to Distributor or any other person or entity for any consequential, indirect, special, punitive or  incidental damages or lost profits, whether foreseeable or unforeseeable, based on     claims of Distributor or Distributor's customers (including but not limited to, claims for loss of data, goodwill, profits, use of money or use of  product, interruption in use or availability of data stoppage or other work or impairment or assets) arising out of breach or failure of express or  implied warranty, breach of contract, misrepresentation, negligence, strict liability in tort or otherwise, except only in the case of death or personal  injury where and to the extent that applicable law requires such liability.
findings.why: Carves out death or personal injury from the consequential-damages exclusion, leaving Lucid's liability for such claims uncapped where required by law.
